phase_meta.summary: Provide canonical rule contract support so the app can build a traceable rule review workspace. Owns schemas, data quality, and evidence type definitions.
current_focus: Phase 1 + 2 complete — data contract and evidence contract verified
Phase 3 next: STAC eligibility flags, tag taxonomy
not_active_now: New methodology encoding (after AR-ACM0003 contract is solid)
App UI work (owned by app repo)

phase_0_roadmap_contract_freeze.title: Roadmap Contract Freeze
phase_0_roadmap_contract_freeze.summary: Lock roadmap, phase sequence, repo boundaries, and SSOT conventions. Both repos match.

phase_1_rule_review_record.title: Rule Review Record (data contract)
phase_1_rule_review_record.summary: Ensure every rule has text, section anchors, type, tags. Minimum data for app review panel display.

phase_2_defensible_verification.title: Defensible Verification (evidence contract)
phase_2_defensible_verification.summary: Evidence type taxonomy, expected_evidence population, requirement_kind. Map rule types to supportable evidence.

phase_3_aoi_stac_support_facts.title: AOI / STAC Support Facts (eligibility flags)
phase_3_aoi_stac_support_facts.summary: Tag taxonomy for satellite eligibility. STAC eligibility heuristic documented.

phase_4_document_workbook_support.title: Document and Workbook Support (extraction contracts)
phase_4_document_workbook_support.summary: Calculation formulas, workbook field expectations, PDD section mappings.

phase_5_method_completeness_target_metho.title: Method Completeness (target methods)
phase_5_method_completeness_target_metho.summary: Encode enough methodologies for pilot demos. AR-ACM0003 + agriculture. Encoding playbook.

phase_6_exportable_verification_output.title: Exportable Verification Output (schema contracts)
phase_6_exportable_verification_output.summary: Verification snapshot JSON Schema. Example validation. CI test.

phase_7_pilot_ready_vvb_workflow.title: Pilot-Ready VVB Workflow (methodology supply)
phase_7_pilot_ready_vvb_workflow.summary: Top 3-5 methodologies encoded for pilots. All pass CI. Manifest complete.
